vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1698

plan.title: fix(triage): one shared decision-reader so summary, history, status, and reset agree on backfilled accepts

narratives.Description: Two readers of the triage audit log (vbrief/.eval/candidates.jsonl) disagree about what counts as a recorded decision. triage summary COUNTS accept decisions written by agent:bootstrap / agent:reconcile backfills toward the in-flight count, but the triage actions reader (reset/history/status) does NOT see those same entries and reports 'no prior decision recorded'. A backfilled accept then shows as a stale in-flight item the canonical reversibility verb (reset) cannot clear. Extract one shared latest_decision(repo, issue) reader used by both surfaces (#537 split-source-of-truth class).
narratives.Overview:
## What to build

Make triage summary and triage actions read the audit log through ONE shared decision-reader that treats backfilled (agent:bootstrap / agent:reconcile) entries identically to interactively-authored ones, so anything summary counts is visible to history/status and actionable by reset.

## Where

- packages/core/src/triage/actions/candidates-log.ts -- the actions-side reader (reset/history/status) that currently filters out backfill entries.
- packages/core/src/triage/summary/reconcilable.ts + packages/core/src/triage/summary/index.ts -- the summary-side reader/counter.
- Extract/reuse a single canonical latest_decision reader consumed by both.

## Out of scope

- Do NOT touch the render modules (owned by in-flight #1696/#1697).
- Do NOT change the audit-log write format or the backfill actors; this is a read-side reconciliation only.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Extract a single canonical latest_decision(repo, issue) reader (likely in packages/core/src/triage/actions/candidates-log.ts or a shared module) that does NOT filter out agent:bootstrap / agent:reconcile actors.
- Route both the summary counter (packages/core/src/triage/summary/) and the actions reader (reset/history/status) through it.
- Add a test: a backfilled accept entry is visible to summary, history, status, and is reset-able.
narratives.UserStory: As a deft operator clearing stale triage state, I want a backfilled accept that summary counts to also be visible to history/status and clearable by reset, so that the session-start in-flight count has a supported reconciliation path.

items.title: backfilled accept visible to history and status

narrative.Acceptance: When an issue's only candidates.jsonl entry is an agent:reconcile/bootstrap backfill accept, triage history and status report it rather than 'no prior decision recorded'.
When reset runs on an issue whose only decision is a backfilled accept, it records the reset rather than refusing with 'no prior decision recorded'.

items.title: summary and actions share one reader

narrative.Acceptance: When summary counts an entry as in-flight, the same shared decision-reader makes that entry visible to the actions surfaces (no divergent actor filter).

references.title: Issue #1698: split audit-log readers (summary vs reset/history/status)

expected_outputs: backfilled accept visible to summary, history, status; reset-able
single shared latest_decision reader consumed by both surfaces
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to GitHub issue #1698 (repro + root cause) under umbrella #1699, not a spec section.
